concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive entry about specific advisor Richard Peng including allegations of discriminatory language (su bei ren), appearing to suppress legitimate observations rather than cleanup
concerns.excerpt:
CMU Richard Peng
对学生使用歧视性语言（su bei ren

concerns.detail: Pure personal attack mocking professor's maturity, self-esteem, and age based on social media behavior (Twitter follow/unfollow), wholly unrelated to academic advising practices
concerns.excerpt: 这个大哥可太有意思了，一个词形容就是幼稚。他会在twitter follow 你然后当你回关以后再取消follow以此骗取follwer，满足他可怜的自尊，一大把年纪了还这样属实招笑。
